composite_description: No drawdown signal. Conditions do not meet any entry threshold.
brief: BTC remains 16.8pp below the -35% drawdown threshold with structural risk active; volatility sits 3.7pp short of the 40% floor, both improving. A crisis z-score below -3.0 would trigger entry despite structural headwinds, or price recovery above the 200d MA would shift regime and unlock dip-buy signals.
